items.zh: 新增 HTML 评论转 Markdown 功能：单卡评论列表可将选中的 HTML 评论一键转为纯文本 Markdown；批量菜单同步支持多卡片批量转换。
items.en: Added HTML-to-Markdown conversion: selected HTML comments on a card can be converted to plain Markdown in one tap; also available as a batch action across multiple cards.

items.zh: 新增 stable-only 在线更新清单，上传安装包到 123 网盘直链目录后可生成 MNUtils 插件商店可读取的 manifest。
items.en: Added a stable-only online update manifest so MNUtils can read the latest package after it is uploaded to a 123pan direct-link directory.

items.zh: 新增结构化双语更新日志 JSON，方便 MNUtils 在历史版本页展示各版本更新内容。
items.en: Added structured bilingual changelog JSON so MNUtils can show version notes in the history page.

items.zh: 批量菜单新增清空所有评论和清空所有标题操作，支持多卡片确认与撤销分组。
items.en: Added batch actions to clear all comments or all titles across selected cards, with confirmation and undo grouping.

items.zh: Markdown 行内链接定位支持与卡片链接一致的点按/长按行为，并修复长按触发文字选择的问题。
items.en: Markdown inline link locating now supports the same tap and long-press behavior as card links, with text selection suppressed during long press.

items.zh: 新增 Markdown 行内链接列表与编辑弹窗，支持直接修改显示文本和链接地址。
items.en: Added Markdown inline link listing and editing, including separate display-text and URL fields.

items.zh: 快速导航条提升为顶部常驻横向导航，批量选择入口迁入顶栏。
items.en: Promoted quick navigation to a persistent top rail and moved batch selection into the top bar.

items.zh: 新增多选卡片批量评论处理入口，支持只保留第一条内容和提取子卡片后删除原评论。
items.en: Added native multi-card batch comment actions, including keep-first-content and remove-original extraction.

items.zh: 首个正式包：支持查看、筛选、移动、删除、编辑和合并当前卡片评论。
items.en: Initial stable package for viewing, filtering, moving, deleting, editing, and merging comments on the current card.
